programmes.show_description: The most iconic & ear-shattering rock songs that shaped the genre! Including Led Zeppelin's timeless Whole Lotta Love & AC/DC's rebellious Highway to Hell. Crank it up & enjoy!
Your weekend anthems and the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.
Live it loud and Max out on the finest rock anthems! Featuring Paramore, Imagine Dragons, Linkin Park, Evanescence & The Arctic Monkeys. This is Now Rock!
In order, an hour of every song a number 1 rock song in the noughties!
Flicking back through the yearbooks of the highly acclaimed school of rock, these were the tracks that you freaked out to through the years!

programmes.show_name: Turn Up The Pop Punk Anthems!
programmes.show_description: Turn up your spreakers to 11 and live life even louder! 1 hour of 00s Pop Punk Anthems in order, featurng Green Day, Blink-182, Sum 41, Bowling For Soup & The All-American Rejects.
From 1995 to 2009 - 30 minutes of the biggest rock songs from Green Day!
Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Alex Baker brings you his 50 biggest 00s anthems! Expect everything from Green Day to Muse, Linkin Park to the Arctic Monkeys with the tunes getting bigger and louder as we go!
Turn your amp up to 11 & make your mic roar! Here come 25 of the greatest 00s rock karaoke tracks. Featuring The Killers, Fall Out Boy, Arctic Monkeys & many more!
Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
A definitive 6 hour marathon of 00s rock anthems in order! From Alien Ant Farm to The Arctic Monkeys, Fall Out Boy to The Foo Fighters, Weezer to the White Stripes.
Back to the 90s and back to the school disco for some proper full-on guitar action! Including Guns n Roses, Nirvana, Bon Jovi, Oasis, The Offspring and Lenny Kravitz.
Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
From killer riffs in the 20s right back to the legendary solos of the 80s, we're counting down 12 essential anthems that you just need to know!
The 80s was the decade where rock & big hair were inseparable! Just look at Tina Turner, Bonnie Tyler, U2, Whitesnake & Marillion.
Your weekend anthems and the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.
A 2-hour run through, in order, of top 3 hits from the 90s - all with that rock n roll swagger! Expect plenty of U2, Def Leppard, Meat Loaf and Brit Pop!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
Claire Sturgess relives her 50 greatest heroes with the rock music that defined the 00s! Blink, MCR, Razorlight and Kings of Leon are all in the top 10 - but who's at number 1?
From 2013 to 2022 - 40 minutes of the biggest rock songs from The 1975!
Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Starting in the 00s, bow before the royal rock stage! Home to the best front men and leading ladies that the world of rock has produced!
50 mega-anthems that rocked the 00s! With Green Day, Linkin Park, The Strokes, Paramore, Blink-182, The Killers & much more!
From our sister channel NOW 80s T'Pau's Carol Decker brings a bit of Heart & Soul to a countdown of 80s ladies who liked to rock! With Joan Jett, Stevie Nicks & Pat Benatar.
